description_long: This is a structured, boxy handbag crafted from smooth brown leather with a subtle sheen. The bag features a single, sturdy short handle attached with gold-toned metal hardware, giving it a classic and elegant appearance. The front side is adorned with a rectangular gold clasp, which serves as the primary closure mechanism, and a small round gold accent in the lower corner. The sides reveal a gusseted construction, allowing for expansion and increased interior capacity. The back is plain, with the same brown leather finish and visible stitching along the edges. The overall design is minimalist, with the gold hardware providing a touch of sophistication.
description: A structured brown leather handbag with a short handle and gold hardware, featuring a boxy silhouette and a front clasp closure.
description_view_0: Front view showing the gold clasp closure, small round gold accent, and the handle arching above.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the gusseted construction and the attachment points of the handle.
description_view_2: Back view displaying a plain brown leather surface with visible stitching and the handle.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, mirroring the gusseted structure and handle attachment.
attribute_strap_type: Single short handle, non-adjustable, attached with gold metal rings at the top.
attribute_closure_mechanism: Rectangular gold clasp located on the front center of the bag.
attribute_decorative_elements: Small round gold accent on the lower right front; gold hardware on handle attachments and clasp.
